description: Synthetic labeled retrieval queries for offline comparison of vector-only, BM25-only, and hybrid ranking mechanics.

queries.notes: Exact wording appears in the target legal chunk.

queries.query: which clause says the vendor covers intellectual property lawsuits from the hosted service
queries.notes: Query paraphrases indemnification without using the exact chunk wording.
Numeric financial value should anchor the answer.

queries.query: what law governs disputes and where must they be filed
queries.notes: Legal clause question over governing law and forum.

queries.query: cite the source for customer data retention after termination
queries.notes: Citation-oriented query should retrieve the source chunk.
Ambiguous query has multiple acceptable risk-related chunks.

queries.query: security incident notification timing in the data processing addendum
queries.notes: There are security-policy distractors that are topically similar but not the DPA notification clause.
Exact phrase and number should help BM25 promote the correct chunk.

queries.query: can the customer inspect security controls every year
queries.notes: Paraphrase of audit rights with weak lexical overlap.

queries.query: deferred revenue 54.2 million prepaid annual support
queries.notes: Financial numeric value plus account name.

queries.query: force majeure delay natural disaster labor strike government order
queries.notes: Legal clause with several exact lexical anchors.

queries.query: does management say the company can keep operating
source for operating cash flow and capital expenditures
cybersecurity incidents customer concentration foreign exchange supplier disruption
queries.notes: Risk query includes words also present in security-policy chunks.
